steps.title: Evaluate the functions
steps.content:
Substitute $x=4$ into each function:
$$
f(4)=4+3=7
$$
$$
g(4)=3(4)=12
$$

steps.title: Compute the expression
steps.content: Now use those two function values in the requested expression: $$ 5(7)-12=35-12=23 $$ The result matches choice D. The answer is D.
